name: up-cli
revised: Large-project focus — features stay, interface simplifies
source: Codebase audit + large-project vibe coding research + gap analysis
description: Ship v1.0 for large-project vibe coding: simplify CLI from 28 to 14 commands, stabilize core loop, add schema validation, consolidate parallel modules, and wire memory for context retention.
vision: Make AI-assisted development on large codebases safe, traceable, and context-aware. Solve the 7 failure modes of vibe coding at scale: context loss, architectural debt, security gaps, accountability holes, review bottlenecks, agent coordination, and shared context fragmentation.

pillars.safe: Every AI change is checkpointed, reviewed, and reversible
pillars.traceable: Provenance tracking and memory give full accountability
pillars.context_aware: Memory system retains decisions, bugs, and learnings across sessions
pillars.scalable: Multi-agent parallel execution with dependency-aware scheduling

target_audience: Teams using AI assistants (Claude Code, Cursor) on large codebases (50k+ LOC) where context loss, coordination, and accountability are real problems.

cut_commands.branch_group: Remove 4 subcmds. Git handles branch rules.
cut_commands.memory_collapse: 11 → 3 subcmds. Remove: recall, branch, sync, session, list, clear, reset, migrate.
cut_commands.agent_collapse: 4 → 2 subcmds. Remove: status (fold into up status), cleanup (automatic).
cut_commands.provenance_collapse: 4 → 1 subcmd. Remove: list/stats (fold into status --verbose), verify.

userStories.title: Collapse memory from 11 to 3 subcommands
userStories.description: Keep: search, record, status. Remove CLI registration for: recall, branch, sync, session, list, clear, reset, migrate. Memory auto-sync stays internal via hooks.
acceptanceCriteria: up memory status works (new — shows stats + branch info)

userStories.title: Collapse agent from 4 to 2 subcommands
userStories.description: Keep: spawn, merge. Remove: status (fold into up status), cleanup (auto after merge). Agent cleanup runs automatically when merge succeeds.
acceptanceCriteria: up agent merge auto-cleans worktree on success
up agent cleanup removed from CLI

userStories.title: Collapse provenance from 4 to 1 subcommand
userStories.description: Keep: show. Remove: list, stats, verify. Fold list/stats into up status --verbose.
acceptanceCriteria: up status --verbose shows recent provenance + stats

userStories.title: Remove branch command group
userStories.description: Remove all 4 branch subcommands. Git handles branch rules natively.
acceptanceCriteria: Source file kept for potential v2

userStories.title: Remove dashboard, summarize, bisect, history
userStories.description: Remove these 4 standalone commands from CLI. Source files kept.

userStories.title: Auto-install hooks during init, remove standalone command
userStories.description: up init auto-installs hooks. Remove hooks as standalone. Add --no-hooks to init.

userStories.title: Make sync automatic, remove standalone command
userStories.description: Sync runs via post-commit hook. Remove as standalone command.

userStories.title: Simplify learn command routing
userStories.description: up learn = full pipeline (analyze + plan). up learn TOPIC = research. up learn --status = show status. No hidden subcommand routing.

userStories.title: Add tests for commands/start/ core loop
userStories.description: The main value path has zero tests. Cover: observe, checkpoint, execute, verify, commit phases. Circuit breaker. Dry-run mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover circuit breaker after 3 failures

userStories.title: Create shared PRD schema with validation
userStories.description: Dataclass schema for prd.json shared between learn/plan.py and commands/start/. Validate on write and read.

userStories.title: Consolidate parallel.py and parallel_scheduler.py
userStories.description: Merge into single parallel/ package. One clear API.

userStories.title: Fix JSON extraction in plan.py
userStories.description: Replace bracket-depth matching with fenced code block extraction + json.loads fallback.

userStories.title: Centralize truncation limits in UpConfig
userStories.description: Move hardcoded 10000/12000 char limits to UpConfig.ai_max_prompt_chars.
acceptanceCriteria: learn/research.py and learn/plan.py read from config

userStories.title: Add debug logging to silent exception handlers
userStories.description: Replace bare except:pass with logger.debug() in record_to_memory, AST fallbacks, event handlers.
acceptanceCriteria: All silent handlers log at debug level

userStories.title: Update README and help for 14-command surface
userStories.description: Rewrite README quick-start. Update up --help with grouped commands. Remove references to cut commands.
acceptanceCriteria: README shows core workflow: init → save → diff → reset

userStories.title: Improve first-run experience
userStories.description: up init prints next-steps showing the safety workflow + memory setup.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: save → AI work → diff workflow
Mentions memory search for context retention

userStories.title: Bump version to 1.0.0 and tag release
userStories.description: Update version everywhere. Tag v1.0.0. All tests must pass.

large_project_problems_addressed: Architectural debt → learn system + PRD schema
Multi-agent coordination → agent spawn/merge + parallel scheduler
Shared context loss → memory auto-indexing via hooks
